result.reason: SSH duplicate fails when using SSH Jump Mode due to incorrect cloning of SSH tunnel related properties.
result.approach: Inspect `ConnectionInfo.Clone()` and related methods in `ConnectionInitiator.cs` and `ConnectionInfoInheritance.cs` to ensure all properties relevant to SSH Jump Mode (including `SSHTunnelConnectionName` and any other tunnel-related configurations) are correctly deep-copied during duplication, preventing shared references or missing data in the new connection.
